title: `podman restart` fails when `--net container` and `add-host`
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

```
$ podman run -d --name myweb --add-host myweb:127.0.0.1 busybox httpd -f -p 80
379be64241725057c6d236733cd6ca159e8543942ccea257a4918e5afa289aa9
$ podman run --net container:myweb -d --name myweb8080 --add-host myweb8080:127.0.0.1 busybox httpd -f -p 8080
8d0889fb11a736042b9de9ee6bda65718a45a6936457256c3cf4570d92804ed8
$ podman restart -t=1 myweb8080
Error: error creating hosts file for container 8d0889fb11a736042b9de9ee6bda65718a45a6936457256c3cf4570d92804ed8 which depends on container 379be64241725057c6d236733cd6ca159e8543942ccea257a4918e5afa289aa9: unable to open /tmp/user/1007/vfs-containers/379be64241725057c6d236733cd6ca159e8543942ccea257a4918e5afa289aa9/userdata/hosts: open /tmp/user/1007/vfs-containers/379be64241725057c6d236733cd6ca159e8543942ccea257a4918e5afa289aa9/userdata/hosts: no such file or directory
```

**Output of `podman version`:**


```
1.2.0-dev
``git9b21f14``
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
$ podman info --debug
```
